name: Live 4" White Star Ornithogalum Plant - Good Little Garden™
description:
This White Star Ornithogalum Plant from Good Little Garden™ will add bright, natural charm to your home decor or houseplant display. Sourced from California and wrapped in floral laminated paper, this plant has blooms that last for 3 weeks, providing sophisticated beauty to any space.

Care Instructions
Provide bright indirect light with minimal direct sunlight and keep at room temperature. Allow the top third of soil to dry between waterings. Remove spent flowers and allow for dormancy until next blooming season.

Good Little Garden™: Where bright days bloom.™
